scripts.build: echo 'Indexing and Building Graph data' && node src/cli.cjs index && node src/cli.cjs graph
scripts.prebuild: echo 'Execute pre-build to generate ultragraph-kb.node binary' && cd native && npm run build:dev
scripts.graph: echo 'Building Graph data' && node src/cli.cjs graph
scripts.graph-search: echo 'Searching Graph data' && node src/cli.cjs graph-search
scripts.db-ingest: echo 'Ingesting data into DB' && node src/cli.cjs db-ingest
scripts.db-rag: echo 'Performing RAG on DB' && node src/cli.cjs db-rag
